race.comment: TAWAAJ (11) has been racing in better events than this, albeit beaten a long way in a Saturday race most recently. She bumped into a smart one at Bunbury as well, so coming back to this level is a big tick. Should get her chance and a sharp turnaround in form wouldn't surprise. TRAILER TRUCK (4) has switched to the Hunter barn since his last run at York where he was disappointing when in the market. He's trialled well coming into this and he looks to have enough speed to cross from the wide alley. Wouldn't surprise to see him put his best foot forward. GILDED REIGN (5) is another who lines up here fresh after not featuring on debut over 1400m. Back to the sprint trip can see him improve on resumption. LONGTIMEBELIEVER (6) hasn't been far away in recent events and can make an impression. LE BEAU (1) is worth including on his recent run.
